query: postgresql index types btree gin gist performance

top_10.rationale: Bruce Momjian (core PostgreSQL developer) 'Flexible Indexing with Postgres' PDF — authoritative practitioner reference covering GiST R-tree indexing, index types, and performance characteristics from a core PG contributor.
MinervaDB 'Optimal Indexing for PostgreSQL Performance' PDF — practical guide covering B-tree, GiST, SP-GiST, GIN, and performance trade-offs including when non-B-tree indexes are superior.
